data.title: Algoma Steel Group Joins BMO Global Metals Conference
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Algoma Steel Group ( (TSE:ASTL) ) has issued an update.

Algoma Steel Group Inc. announced its participation in the BMO 34th Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference held from February 24 to February 26, 2025, in Hollywood, Florida. This participation underscores Algoma’s ongoing transformation journey towards modernizing its operations and adopting environmentally friendly practices, which could enhance its industry positioning as a leading producer of green steel and provide a secure steel supply for North America.

More about Algoma Steel Group

Algoma Steel Group Inc., based in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, Canada, is a fully integrated producer of hot and cold rolled steel products, including sheet and plate. The company serves various sectors such as automotive, construction, energy, defense, and manufacturing, and is the only producer of discrete plate products in Canada. Algoma is recognized for its Direct Strip Production Complex, a low-cost producer of hot rolled sheet steel in North America. The company is undergoing a transformation by modernizing its plate mill and adopting electric arc technology to lower carbon emissions, aiming to become a leading producer of green steel in North America.

YTD Price Performance: -21.96%

Average Trading Volume: 521,769

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $793M

International Public Partnerships Limited ( (GB:INPP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

International Public Partnerships Limited has announced a change in its voting rights, with Rathbones Investment Management Ltd and associated entities reducing their holdings from 15.441200% to 14.994400% as of February 21, 2025. This adjustment in voting rights could impact the company’s governance and influence within the infrastructure investment sector, reflecting shifts in stakeholder engagement and investment strategies.

More about International Public Partnerships Limited

International Public Partnerships Limited is a company focused on investing in public infrastructure projects. It operates primarily in the non-UK market, providing investment opportunities in infrastructure assets that deliver essential services.

data.title: Lexaria Bioscience Advances GLP-1 Study with New Ethics Approval
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Lexaria Bioscience ( (LEXX) ) has issued an announcement.

Lexaria Bioscience has received ethics board approval for the fifth study arm in its Phase 1b, 12-week chronic study GLP-1-H24-4 in Australia, allowing dosing to commence. This study, which includes two major GLP-1 drugs, semaglutide and tirzepatide, aims to explore the potential of Lexaria’s DehydraTECH technology to enhance drug performance through oral delivery. The approval marks a significant milestone for Lexaria, highlighting its innovative approach in the drug delivery industry and its potential impact on the global GLP-1 market.

More about Lexaria Bioscience

Lexaria Bioscience Corp. is a global innovator in drug delivery platforms, known for its patented DehydraTECH technology. This technology enhances the oral delivery of active pharmaceutical ingredients, improving bio-absorption and potentially aiding in drug delivery across the blood-brain barrier. The company operates a licensed research laboratory and holds a substantial intellectual property portfolio with 48 patents granted worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: -36.96%

Average Trading Volume: 190,813

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $25.45M

Daido Group Limited ( (HK:0544) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Daido Group Limited has announced a special general meeting to be held on March 17, 2025, to discuss and approve resolutions related to changes in rental agreements for their premises at No. 8 Kwai Hei Street, Kwai Chung, New Territories, Hong Kong. The meeting will address the confirmation of a rent increase and the establishment of a new lease agreement, both involving subsidiaries of Daido Group Limited. These resolutions, if approved, will authorize company directors to execute necessary documents and actions to implement the changes, potentially impacting the company’s operational costs and strategic positioning in the real estate market.

data.title: Great Western Mining Announces Share Capital Reorganisation
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Great Western Mining ( (GB:GWMO) ).

Great Western Mining Corporation PLC has announced a proposed share capital reorganisation, which involves consolidating and subdividing its ordinary shares. This reorganisation is intended to streamline the company’s share structure and is considered beneficial for both the company and its shareholders. The changes will not alter the proportion of issued ordinary share capital held by each shareholder, and the new shares are expected to commence trading on 31 March 2025. The company has scheduled a general meeting for 20 March 2025 to vote on the resolutions, encouraging shareholders to participate remotely.

More about Great Western Mining

Great Western Mining Corporation PLC is involved in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources in Mineral County, Nevada. The company holds a significant tract of land in this region, which is part of the Walker Lane Structural Belt, known for its potential in gold, silver, and copper deposits. Great Western Mining operates several concession areas, including the Olympic Gold Project, and is engaged in joint ventures for processing and secondary recovery of minerals.

Average Trading Volume: 62,574,253

Current Market Cap: £1.57M

data.title: Fresenius Medical Care Divests Laboratory Assets to Quest Diagnostics
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Fresenius Medical Care ( (FMS) ).

On February 24, 2025, Fresenius Medical Care announced the divestment of select laboratory assets to Quest Diagnostics, a move aimed at optimizing its portfolio and focusing on its core business of providing dialysis care. This strategic agreement will allow Quest to acquire assets from Fresenius’s Spectra Laboratories, enhancing Quest’s capabilities in dialysis-related water testing and expanding its laboratory services for end-stage kidney disease. The acquisition, expected to close in the second half of 2025, will enable Fresenius to benefit from operational efficiencies and leverage Quest’s expertise in laboratory medicine, ultimately improving patient and clinical experiences.

More about Fresenius Medical Care

Fresenius Medical Care is the world’s leading provider of products and services for individuals with renal diseases, serving approximately 4.1 million patients globally who undergo regular dialysis treatment. The company operates a network of 3,732 dialysis clinics, providing treatments for around 308,000 patients worldwide, and is a leading provider of dialysis products such as machines and dialyzers. Fresenius Medical Care is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange.

YTD Price Performance: 4.24%

Average Trading Volume: 247,741

data.title: Itron Announces Retirement of Two Board Members
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Itron ( (ITRI) ) is now available.

On February 19, 2025, Itron, Inc. announced the upcoming retirement of two board members, Lynda L. Ziegler and Mary C. Hemmingsen, at the end of their terms during the 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Lynda L. Ziegler, who has served on the board since 2013, and Mary C. Hemmingsen, a member since 2022, both decided not to stand for re-election due to personal reasons unrelated to any disagreements with the company. Consequently, the board will reduce its size from nine to seven directors effective May 8, 2025.

More about Itron

data.title: China Conch Renews Cement Kiln Co-treatment Agreement with CNBM
data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:0587) ) just unveiled an update.

China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Ltd. has announced the renewal of its Cement Kiln Co-treatment Framework Agreement with CNBM, extending the partnership from January 2025 to December 2027. This agreement involves CNBM providing comprehensive cement kiln co-treatment services to Haizhong Environmental for industrial waste treatment projects, with terms and pricing based on project specifics and market rates. The renewal signifies continued collaboration and compliance with Hong Kong’s Listing Rules, impacting the company’s operations and industry positioning.

More about China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Ltd.

China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Ltd. operates in the environmental protection industry, focusing on providing cement kiln co-treatment services for industrial waste treatment projects. The company collaborates with partners to offer comprehensive services, including cement kiln systems and ancillary equipment.
